items.q: The character Carl Fredricksen appears in Men in Black.
items.explanation: Carl Fredricksen appears in Up, not Men in Black.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Avatar?
items.explanation: Jake Sully is one of the defining characters in Avatar.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character E.T..
items.explanation: E.T. is strongly linked to E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.

items.q: The character Moana appears in Moana.
items.explanation: Moana is a key character in Moana.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Agent J.
items.explanation: Agent J is strongly linked to Men in Black.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Captain Jack Sparrow.
items.a: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
items.explanation: Captain Jack Sparrow is strongly linked to Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Iron Man?
items.explanation: Tony Stark is one of the defining characters in Iron Man.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone?
items.explanation: Harry Potter is one of the defining characters in Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone.

items.q: Which movie features the character Tony Stark?
items.explanation: Tony Stark is associated with The Avengers.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Incredibles?
items.explanation: Mr. Incredible is one of the defining characters in The Incredibles.
